title: Review Report Schema
description: Validates the output of automated code review systems (JulesExecutor, AGY designer, static analysis). Used in Step 4 of the 7-Step Loop. A review report determines whether the worker's branch is approved for integration or needs refinement.

threadId.description: Must match the threadId of the AgentContract being reviewed.

status.description: Review outcome. 'needs-changes' is a softer rejection — the worker should refine rather than restart.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the review outcome. Should state clearly what passed, what failed, and what needs to change.

filePath.description: File path where the issue was found.

line.description: Line number of the issue. Omit if the issue is file-wide.

details.description: Detailed list of issues found during review. Empty array means no issues found.

recommendations.description: Recommended steps for the worker to address the issues. Specific guidance, not generic advice.

overall.description: Overall quality score (0-100). 80+ = approved, 50-79 = needs-changes, <50 = rejected.

score.description: Optional numerical scoring for automated reviews.
